component.name: OpenReadest
component.summary: Local-first ebook reader with WebDAV sync

description.p: OpenReadest is a local-first ebook reader focused on reading, annotation, library management, and WebDAV synchronization.
Built as a modern rewrite of Foliate, OpenReadest uses Next.js and Tauri to deliver a smooth cross-platform reading experience.
The application keeps core reading tools while removing the original hosted account, cloud storage, telemetry, payment, and Discord presence features.

ul.li: Multi-format support for EPUB, MOBI, KF8 (AZW3), FB2, CBZ, TXT, and PDF (experimental).
Switch between scrolling or paginated reading modes for your preferred reading style.
Full-text search across the entire book to find relevant sections quickly.
Add highlights, bookmarks, and notes to enhance your reading experience and learning.
Easily excerpt text from books for detailed notes and analysis.
Instantly look up words and terms with built-in dictionary and Wikipedia integration.
Translate selected text instantly using DeepL for accurate translations.
Read two books or documents side by side in split-screen mode.
Customize fonts, layout, theme mode, and theme colors for a personalized reading experience.
Synchronize book files, reading progress, notes, and bookmarks through WebDAV.
Text-to-Speech functionality for a more accessible reading experience.
Organize, sort, and manage your entire ebook library with advanced library management tools.
One-click file association to quickly open supported files from your file browser.

description.p: OpenReadest also includes custom CSS support for personalized styling and code syntax highlighting for technical books.

ul.li: Rebranded the application as OpenReadest for standalone public release.
Removed hosted account, payment, telemetry, and Discord presence features.
Kept local reading workflows together with WebDAV synchronization support.
